title: Stack Overflow: How We Do App Caching - 2019 Edition
summary: This is #5 in a very long series of posts on Stack Overflow’s architecture. Stack Overflow: How We Do Monitoring - 2018 Edition So…caching. What is it? title: HTTPS on Stack Overflow: The End of a Long Road
summary: Today, we deployed HTTPS by default on Stack Overflow. All traffic is now redirected to https:// and Google links will change over the next few weeks. The activation of this is quite literally flipping a switch (feature flag), but getting to that point has taken years of work. As of now, HTTPS is the default on all Q&A websites. We’ve…
